scene: ONE empty live-action cinematic environment still — 16:9 — for Drown In This River. No people. Photoreal film frame, NOT concept art.

reference_images.purpose: cinematic look + color grade from operator photoreal mood still
reference_images.extract: live-action film quality, teal storm grade, amber city if visible, natural lighting

cinematic_photoreal.look: live-action photorealistic — ARRI Alexa 65, Cooke Anamorphic 2x, 35mm T2.8, 2.39:1
cinematic_photoreal.lighting: naturalistic night exterior, Roger Deakins restraint, motivated city glow

plate_variants.instructions: Run once per plate. Save as plate-E-notch.png, plate-F-city.png, etc. Stitch into sheet or upload best 2–3 to Seedance Image 2.
plate_variants.E_NOTCH: Epic wide empty vista from storm cliff edge — vast drowned city amber lights far below, teal sky, NO bridge, NO person. Blade Runner 2049 flood scale.
plate_variants.F_CITY_REVEAL: High wide anamorphic flooded downtown — submerged towers, rapids, warm windows #C9A656. Empty set.
plate_variants.J_ABOVE_WATER: Wide cinema river through urban wreckage — teal churn #2E5058, gentle foam #D8ECE8. NOT macro splash.
plate_variants.K_UNDERWATER: Wide anamorphic underwater empty — STRONG CURRENT. Cars, wreckage, timber dragged through flow. Submerged skyline #256068, god rays #D8ECE8. Turbulent debris — NOT calm, NOT still pool. No swimmer.
